Product Details
MYA / PDU / PSD / PDI / EM / EU Series

Practical pneumatic sealing profiles for cylinders and air-driven systems requiring smooth motion and reliable air retention.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

MYA / PDU / PSD / PDI / EM / EU Series

Designed for pneumatic cylinders and reciprocating air systems with attention to low friction and consistent sealing behavior.

Pneumatic sealing series cover practical groove standards and structural forms used in air cylinders, helping customers match suitable sealing profiles for speed, pressure, and assembly conditions.

Low-Friction Motion

Supports smoother reciprocating motion in air cylinders where start-up resistance matters.

Pneumatic Sealing

Helps maintain reliable air sealing across different cylinder structures and groove styles.

Series-Based Selection

Multiple profile families are available to match installation space, operating speed, and maintenance needs.
